Description: Golden-yellow, fiberless treasure from early season. Suvarnarekha mangoes are medium to large, ovate-oblong fruits with stunning golden-yellow skin and faint crimson flush. The flesh is soft, fibreless, and juicy with pleasant flavor - sweet with abundant juice and wonderful Indian flavor featuring notes of citrus and peach. Creamy, silky flesh provides rich, sweet taste with a faint trace of bitterness. Aromatic and among India's finest dessert mangoes.
Key Characteristics: Fibreless; Sweet with citrus/peach notes; Aromatic; Early season

Description: The King of Mangoes - perfection in every bite. Banganapalli mangoes are known for their perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess. Smooth, buttery flesh followed by intense sweetness that lingers. Firm, meaty texture with fibre-free sweet yellow pulp. This variety features a clean, refreshing taste without sour undertones. Pleasant aroma complements thin, blemish-free skin. Ideal for those preferring non-fibrous textures.
Key Characteristics: Fibre-free; Sweet & mildly tangy; Buttery texture; Pleasant aroma; Blemish-free skin

Description: The Sugarcane Mango - liquid gold when ripe. Chinna Rasalu is an extremely juicy and sweet mango from Nuzvid, Andhra Pradesh. Named for its extraordinary sweetness akin to sugarcane, this variety practically turns into liquid gold when ripe. So soft and fiber-less that it's called 'The Sucking Mango' - recommended to massage, peel the tip, and sip the juice rather than slice. High Brix content delivers extreme sweetness with liquid texture.
Key Characteristics: Extremely juicy; High Brix sweetness; Fiber-less soft pulp; Sucking mango; Low shelf life; Liquid texture

Description: Heritage mango from the red laterite soil of Bobbili, grown on the same land for generations. Rich amber pulp with finer fibres - almost threads of pure flavour. Farmers call it 'the mango that tastes like memory.' Juicy with distinctive taste developed from Bobbili's unique terroir. Best squeezed and sipped straight from the skin. A royal brand cultivated by the Bobbili Samsthanam family for centuries.
Key Characteristics: Fine-fibrous pulp; Rich amber color; Intense flavor; Heritage variety; Best sipped fresh

Description: The Sweetest Mango - pure sugarcane sweetness. Cheruku Rasalu is celebrated for unparalleled sweetness and luscious pulp with no sourness whatsoever. The name itself is descriptive: 'Cheruku' means sugarcane and 'Rasalu' means juiciness. Characterized by 'Classic' taste with 'Excellent' level of sweetness reminiscent of pure sugarcane. Small to medium sized with distinctively sweet and tangy flavor, juicy fiberless flesh. Ideal for fresh consumption, juices, and smoothies.
Key Characteristics: Exceptionally sweet; No sourness; Sugarcane flavor; Fiberless; Juicy; Best for fresh & juices

Description: The Royal Mango of the Deccan - fit for emperors. Imam Pasand, also known as Himayat, is the rare and highly prized cultivar favored by Mughal Emperor Humayun himself. Significantly larger than most mangoes (400-800g), with pale yellow 100% fiberless flesh like silk custard. Intensely sweet with rich, creamy notes reminiscent of mango sorbet, complemented by subtle citrus and honey undertones. Strong perfumed aroma fills rooms. Balanced sweetness with low acidity. Zero fibre, melting consistency.
Key Characteristics: Fiberless creamy pulp; Large (400-800g); Intensely sweet; Royal heritage; Citrus & honey notes; Perfumed aroma

Description: The Sugar Pot Mango - nature's confection from East Godavari. Panchadara Kalisa translates to 'sugar pot' - a name that references its distinctive taste and pot-like shape. Native to East Godavari, grown across Andhra Pradesh, Telangana and coastal regions. Thick skin with sweet, juicy flesh commonly enjoyed by sucking or squeezing. Soft, short fibers. Pale yellow skin delivers delightful balance of sweetness and acidity. Firm texture with excellent flavor combining both elements harmoniously. Available mid-April for over two months.
Key Characteristics: Sweet & tangy balance; Thick skin; Soft fibers; Juicy flesh; Firm texture; Sucking mango; 2+ months season
